title: cicer pimpinellifolium subsp. minutum
intro: Cicer pimpinellifolium subsp. minutum is a subspecies of wild celery, also known as microcelery, which is a perennial herb native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cicer pimpinellifolium subsp. minutum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
